title: Created Simple Storage Network
description: Created Storage Network is an Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Lothrazar with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.
body:
Created Storage Network is my second Resource Pack that updates the textures of this incredible mod made by Lothrazar with the textures of another incredible mod by Simibubi.

 

ALL textures credits go to the creators of both mod!

 

The Resourcepack modifies the original textures of the Simple Storage Network mod and adds new textures that fit better with Steampunk mods like create and Immersive Engineering.
